question: What is the TV Channel that shows the cartoon "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!"? List the TV Channel's series name.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.series_name FROM TV_Channel AS T1 JOIN Cartoon AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.Channel WHERE T2.Title = "The Rise of the Blue Beetle!";
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.attr_bef995_identifier FROM tv_channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_c485d2 WHERE T2.designation = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
raw_response: SELECT T1.attr_bef995_identifier FROM tv_channel AS T1 JOIN cartoon AS T2 ON T1.key = T2.attr_c485d2 WHERE T2.designation = 'The Rise of the Blue Beetle!'
